name: dispatch_writer
description: Launch a Writer sub-agent to produce a complete tutorial lesson narrative from grounded research notes. The Writer has no tools — it writes solely from the research references you provide. Always call dispatch_researcher at least once before calling this.

research_refs.description: List of file paths to the research notes markdown files produced by Researcher calls for this lesson (e.g. ['workspace/lesson-03/research-001.md', 'workspace/lesson-03/research-002.md']). Must contain at least one entry. The Writer will receive all referenced files as context.

lesson_spec.description: JSON string containing the lesson specification from the planning stage. Must include at minimum: lesson_id, lesson_title, lesson_teaches, primary_symbol, code_refs, and concepts_introduced. Example: '{"lesson_id": "lesson-03", "lesson_title": "Retry Policy", "lesson_teaches": "How exponential backoff is applied to provider rate limits", "primary_symbol": "adapters.openai_provider.OpenAIProvider._call_with_retry", "code_refs": [...], "concepts_introduced": ["exponential-backoff"]}'
